title: Bob's Craftable saddles
description: You can now craft a saddle instead of traveling far and wide to find one. It is soon going to be a data pack! the mod is for fabric.
body:
This mod can be used to craft saddles. You can download the mod for fabric. I am trying to get the mod to a data pack so you dont need a mod loader at all, This will be coming in a further update.![To craft the saddle you need 3 leather at the top of the crafting table. following that two leads in the middle and two iron in the bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acdef5044dfdfff61dac8d96097fe6e1d5e8de2e.png)
This is how you craft the saddle.
